TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Katanka, title = Katanka, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Katanka} }

S.FORM: alang Katanka ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 415 buwan, 1,143 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 327 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 816 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 26%, Bunun 4%, Truku 15%, Tayan 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Katanka hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Katanka hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Katanka hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Katanka hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Katanka hya' ga Palinkaan. tay 'llaw na Katanka hya' ga Kaliyawan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Katanka ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 415 buwan, 1,143 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 327 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 816 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 26%, Bunun 4%, Truku 15%, Tayan 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Katanka hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Katanka hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Katanka hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Katanka hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Katanka hya' ga Palinkaan. tay 'llaw na Katanka hya' ga Kaliyawan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ katanka ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕinʦ~ʨima ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, truku **%, tajan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na katanka ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na katanka ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na katanka ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na katanka ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na katanka ħjaʔ ɣa palinkaan. taj ʔllaw na katanka ħjaʔ ɣa kalijawan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
